title: peucedanum hispidum
intro: Peucedanum hispidum is a perennial plant species belonging to the carrot family (Apiaceae) and is commonly known as hispid angelica or hispid hog's fennel. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The plant is believed to offer various health benefits, such as relieving respiratory issues, reducing fever, and supporting digestive health. Peucedanum hispidum can be prepared into herbal remedies like teas, infusions, and extracts, which are often used to treat various ailments.
